children.heading: Startup funds
children.label: a Startup funds
children.text: For the purposes of , there are authorized to be appropriated $1,000,000.section 583j–3 of this title

children.heading: Matching funds
children.label: b Matching funds
children.text: For the purposes of , there are authorized to be appropriated $3,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2016 through 2023 to the Secretary of Agriculture to be made available to the Foundation to match, on a one-for-one basis, private contributions made to the Foundation.section 583j–3 of this title
